name: Blueberry Streusel
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup cold butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the egg.
3. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt) into a bowl.
4. Alternately add buttermilk to the sifted dry ingredients, mixing gently after each addition.
5. Pour the batter into a well-greased 9 x 13 inch pan.
6. Scatter the fresh blueberries over the batter.
7. Mix together the sugar, flour, cinnamon, and nutmeg for the streusel topping.
8. Cut the cold butter into small pieces and blend it into the dry ingredients using your fingers until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
9. Sprinkle the streusel mixture evenly over the blueberries.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit (175 degrees Celsius) for 35 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
